creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have updated qvwm port to follow the latest version.
Please enjoy....

Remove file:
files/BUGS.en
files/CHANGES.en
files/FAQ.en
files/FAQ.jp
files/INSTALL.en
files/MANUAL.jp
files/README.en
files/TODO.en
patches/patch-ac

----------
